# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Profile Uploads
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

add_action('init', 'user_profile_uploads');

function user_profile_uploads() {
    if (isset($_POST['upload_user_file'])) {
        if(!function_exists('wp_handle_upload')) {
            require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php');
        }
        
        $upload_overrides = array('test_form' => false);
        $uploaded_file = $_FILES['user_file'];

        $file_types = array('image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'application/pdf', 'application/msword', 
                            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document');

        if (in_array($uploaded_file['type'], $file_types)) {
            $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
            $user_upload_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
            
            if (!file_exists($user_upload_dir)) {
                wp_mkdir_p($user_upload_dir);
            }
        
            add_filter('upload_dir', function($dirs) use ($user_upload_dir) {
                $dirs['path'] = $user_upload_dir;
                $dirs['url'] = str_replace(ABSPATH, site_url('/'), $user_upload_dir);
                return $dirs;
            });

            $movefile = wp_handle_upload($uploaded_file, $upload_overrides);

            if ($movefile && !isset($movefile['error'])) {
                echo "File uploaded successfully. ";
                echo "File URL: " . $movefile['url'];
            } else {
                echo "Error: " . $movefile['error'];
            }
        } else {
            echo "Invalid file type.";
        }
    }
}

add_shortcode('user_profile_upload_form', 'display_upload_form');

function display_upload_form() {
    if (is_user_logged_in()) {
        $form = '<form enctype="multipart/form-data" method="post">
                    <input type="file" name="user_file" required>
                    <input type="submit" name="upload_user_file" value="Upload">
                 </form>';
    } else {
        $form = 'Please log in to upload files.';
    }
    
    return $form;
}
?>
